message:
chore(beads): reopen 9 stalled frankenterm issues (auto-triage sweep)

Persist a MagentaStream stale-issue sweep run at 2026-04-19T14:13:38Z into
.beads/issues.jsonl. Each of the following issues transitioned
`in_progress → open` with a refreshed `updated_at`, no code or description
changes:

- ft-1memj.28
- ft-akx00.1
- ft-akx00.6.1
- ft-akx00.6.2
- ft-akx00.8
- ft-p48pw
- wa-1igc
- wa-nu4.3.9.5
- wa-nu4.4.3.3

These were claimed but idle for ≥ ~2 weeks and are being returned to the
ready queue so another agent can pick them up. Pure beads-state flush; no
runtime or build changes.
